label: http api • json_object mode handles nested objects, arrays, and enums
query: Return a JSON object for a coffee order with keys: "size" (one of "small", "medium", "large"), "extras" (an array of strings), and "customer" (an object with a "name" string key). Output only the JSON object.
notes: The harder structured-output row: nested object, array, and an enum-constrained field, all validated deterministically by SchemaValidator. A model that emits prose around the JSON, invents enum values, or flattens the nesting fails without any judge. Off-CI (needs a model).
